method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Erosion of Signal' has me contemplating the delicate balance between evidence and distortion in our perception of truth. I want to capture the decay of memories while still allowing the viewer to feel the impact of what remains. Through controlled corruption, I aim to reflect how our understanding shifts over time, much like the artifacts we leave behind.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The use of glitch composites allows me to explore archival themes while highlighting the beauty in decay. This piece draws from the idea that even in distortion, there exists a trace of authenticity.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Ghost Archives" step 1/4. Visual anchor directive: channel separation with burn marks. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: evidence vs distortion; counterpoint with truth erosion over time. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: flat lighting. Technique emphasis: controlled corruption + artifact layering; avoid drifting into Memory Palaces and Spatial Recall. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Ghost Archives step 1/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
